verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: You shall love the Lord with all your heart You shall love the Lord with all your soul You shall love the Lord with all your mind With all your heart, with all your soul, with all your mind :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord, I love You, for all the things You are Oh Lord, I love You, for all the things You do Oh Lord, I love You, help me love You more With all my heart, with all my soul, with all my mind

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: I will love the Lord with all my heart I will love the Lord with all my soul I will love the Lord with all my mind With all my heart, with all my soul, with all my mind :/
